metadata.source: EU CPV 2008 Classification — retained by UK post-Brexit
metadata.description: CPV codes relevant to PS Tender Tracker — IT, Data, Digital, Cloud, AI and related professional services

cpv_codes.relevance: High — broad software category; catches ERP, analytics, SaaS and bespoke software tenders
Medium — sector-specific platforms (healthcare, finance, defence)

cpv_codes.description: Networking, internet and intranet software package
cpv_codes.relevance: Medium — network management, VPN, firewall software

cpv_codes.description: Document creation, drawing, imaging, scheduling and productivity software package
cpv_codes.relevance: Low — general productivity tools, limited alignment
High — ERP, finance systems, case management platforms
Medium — collaboration tools, digital communications platforms
High — database management systems, data warehousing, MDM
Low — utility and system tools
High — information management systems, server infrastructure

cpv_codes.description: Miscellaneous software package and computer systems
cpv_codes.relevance: Medium — catch-all for unlisted software categories

cpv_codes.description: IT services: consulting, software development, internet and support
cpv_codes.relevance: High — broad IT services parent; covers consulting, development, managed services
Low — hardware maintenance, limited alignment with OnePoint services
High — bespoke software development, technical consultancy, agile delivery

cpv_codes.description: Programming services of packaged software products
cpv_codes.relevance: High — configuration and customisation of packaged products
High — architecture, technical design, systems integration consultancy
High — bespoke development, digital transformation delivery
High — discovery, analysis, prototyping
Medium — ongoing support and maintenance
High — data management, data integration, analytics services
High — data pipelines, ETL, batch processing
High — database design, MDM, data governance platforms

cpv_codes.description: Content and data standardisation and classification services
cpv_codes.relevance: High — data quality, master data management, data governance
Medium — web platforms, digital portals, cloud-hosted services
Medium — managed hosting, cloud provider services
High — web application development, digital services
Medium — general IT services not classified elsewhere
High — IT advisory, managed services, technical consultancy
Medium — helpdesk, technical support
High — strategy and advisory, digital transformation consultancy
Medium — network infrastructure, connectivity
Medium — security assessments, penetration testing, audits

cpv_codes.description: Computer back-up and catalogue conversion services
cpv_codes.relevance: Low — backup and archiving services

cpv_codes.description: Research and development services and related consultancy services
cpv_codes.relevance: High — R&D, innovation programmes, proof-of-concept and discovery work
High — innovation consultancy, PoV, Valuepath engagements

cpv_codes.description: Design and execution of research and development
cpv_codes.relevance: High — AI/ML research, data science prototyping

cpv_codes.description: Business services: law, marketing, consulting, recruitment, printing and security
cpv_codes.relevance: Medium — management consulting and change management engagements

cpv_codes.description: Business and management consultancy and related services
cpv_codes.relevance: High — digital strategy, operating model design, transformation programmes
High — business transformation, agile delivery, programme management
High — programme and project delivery services
Low to Medium — digital skills training, data literacy programmes
Medium — technology training, change management enablement
